def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    momentum_window = params['momentum_window']
    atr_window = params['atr_window']
    threshold_multiplier = params['threshold_multiplier']
    df['momentum'] = ta.momentum.roc(df['close'], momentum_window)
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], atr_window).average_true_range()
    threshold = threshold_multiplier * df['atr']
    signals = np.where(df['momentum'] > threshold, 1, np.where(df['momentum'] < -threshold, -1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits strong momentum-driven breakouts when price exceeds volatility-adjusted thresholds, indicating sustained directional moves.
